message:
refactor(lab): extract terminal_policy_outcome helper, add observability gate and bridge-only downgrade detection in dual_run

Major dual_run differential policy refactor:

1. **terminal_policy_outcome helper**: Extracts repeated
   DifferentialPolicyOutcome struct construction into a single
   function, replacing ~10 inline struct literals with calls to
   terminal_policy_outcome().  This eliminates field-ordering bugs
   and makes the policy decision tree easier to read.

2. **Observability gate (eligibility_verdict)**: New
   eligibility_verdict() accessor reads the eligibility_verdict
   metadata key.  Scenarios with
   eligibility_verdict=blocked_missing_observability are now
   short-circuited before the main policy evaluation, preventing
   them from accidentally passing as legitimate results.

3. **Bridge-only downgrade detection**: New
   is_bridge_only_downgrade() checks whether a scenario has
   support_class=bridge_only, which indicates a capability
   downgrade rather than a true failure.  This feeds into the
   policy as a distinct signal.

4. **Test coverage**: New test
   harness_blocked_missing_observability_gate_is_not_a_pass
   (and related tests) verify the observability gate and
   bridge-only downgrade paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
